title: Work Zone Traffic Control Awareness
description: Reviewed MUTCD Part 6 requirements for highway work zones. Covered proper PPE in LTAP zones - high-vis Class 3 required at all times. Discussed worker positioning relative to live traffic lanes. Reviewed emergency response plan for struck-by incidents and evacuation routes.
notes: All I-81 field personnel attended. Updated site safety plan distributed. Emphasized no worker standing in live lane under any circumstances. Posted updated emergency contact numbers at field office.

title: Heavy Equipment Backing and Spotters
description: Following near-miss incident from April 2025 reinforced mandatory spotter requirement for all backing heavy equipment. Covered hand signal standardization. Reviewed spotter positioning and blind zone awareness for haul trucks dozers and excavators. Operators must not move without visual on spotter.
notes: Operators and spotters from all three projects attended. Spot quiz on hand signals - all passed. Identified two crew members who needed refresher on haul truck blind zones. One-on-one coaching completed.

title: Heat Illness Prevention Plan
description: Reviewed heat illness prevention program in advance of summer operations. Covered heat index chart and work-rest ratios. Mandatory buddy system when heat index exceeds 103F. Cool water shade and rest requirements under VA OSHA 16VAC25-60. Reviewed signs and symptoms of heat exhaustion and heat stroke.
notes: All three project crews attended. Distributed laminated heat index wallet cards. Appointed heat illness prevention officer on each crew. Reviewed 2025 heat illness incident and lessons learned.
